subcodes.first_line: O thou who art steadfast in the Covenant! At the Divine Threshold thou art remembered as a true servant, and at the exalted court as one constant in faith [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای ثابت بر میثاق در آستان الهی بعبد صادق مذکوری و در عتبه سامیه به بنده ثابت
subcodes.subjects: @firmness in the Covenant, @power; greatness; centrality of the Covenant, @praise and encouragement
